title: Simplest Hammers Refabricated
description:
A Fabric port of Simplest Hammers, a lightweight mod that adds simple, balanced hammer tools for mining in a 3x3 area.

Simplest Hammers was originally designed for Forge and focuses on providing straightforward hammer-type tools crafted from vanilla mater
body:
This is a Fabric port for [Simplest Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplest-hammers)

Tired of endless digging in Minecraft? Simplest Hammers is a mod designed to make the mining process faster and easier. Forget about the routine and just enjoy the game!

Simplest Hammers introduces hammers that function like pickaxes but in a 3x3 area, making resource gathering and digging areas much easier in the mid-to-late game stages.

Our priority has always been balance and enjoyment of the mod, that's why Simplest Hammers is the ultimate yet another hammer mod. Give it a try!

# Features
- Great designed vanilla-like balance;
- Fancy vanilla-like textures.

# FAQ

**Q:** Does this work on X version?

**A:** Try it and see! If it does, please comment so I can mark it.

**Q:** Will you make a backport?

**A:** Nope, we prefer to keep our attention to the latest versions.

**Q:** Can I use this mod into my modpack?

**A:** Yes!

**Q:** Do you have a Patreon or similar means of supporting your work?

**A:** We have [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/crawkatt) if you want to support work of our team with a penny (if you wish, you can also donate to the [original Mod team](https://ko-fi.com/teamsolar)).
